ops.title: P0: live ccs-run squash engine is a no-op — L1 staging never completes (zero 'L1 staged plan' logs, refs.db empty) in a real session, though the relay forwards correctly and all tests pass. Likely the off-path summarizer decide()/fold() calls hang/fail silently in the detached stage_next task (the real Anthropic boundary is mocked in tests). Full repro + fix approach in .claude/research/cc-squash-followup-plan.md (F1).

ops.text: A live 'ccs run -- claude -p' tool-heavy session produces 'L1 staged plan' logs and refs.db rows
A relay-level test drives serve()->forward_setup->stage_next (real wiring, mocked transport) and asserts a staged plan + ref row after turn 1
A stalled/failing summarizer degrades L1 to no-squash (fail-safe) without wedging the hot path
